---
title: "sandbox_warden.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\sandbox_warden.py"
loc: 96
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.65
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 3.07
overall_score: 2.51
---

## Intent
The `sandbox_warden.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SandboxWarden, __init__, run_in_sandbox. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SandboxWarden, __init__, run_in_sandbox. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [uuid](file://uuid)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SandboxWarden`
- `__init__`
- `run_in_sandbox`
